text:
If I set 
LICENSE=        UNKNOWN
or
LICENSE=        NONE
I get this from poudriere:

=>> Status   security/p5-Crypt-X509 | p5-Crypt-X509-0.52: check-sanity
=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
===>  p5-Crypt-X509-0.52 License UNKNOWN needs confirmation, but BATCH is
defined.
*** Error code 1
Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/p5-Crypt-X509
